content.full_text:
November 12, 1991

Sandra Taylor  
Fair Political Practices  
Sacramento, CA 95814

Dear Ms Taylor:

I wanted to take a moment to state my interpretation of our phone call this morning. My question was whether or not it is in violation of the election code to use the picture of an officer in uniform in campaign material. I told you that we had contacted Sheriff Gary Tindel of Yuba County for his approval since the officer shown in the Sutter County Sheriff's race brochure is a Yuba County officer. Sheriff Tindel said it was ok with him. You informed me that there is nothing in the Political Reform Act that might prevent us from using the picture. You suggested that I contact the County District Attorney. I have contacted Mr. Carl Adams the DA for Sutter County. He confirmed that it is permissible to use the picture and that we would not be violating any election code law.

Thank you for taking the time to answer our question.

Sincerely,

Gennis Zeller
